title: AI Tutor on Your Screen
abstract: Transform your learning experience with AI Tutor on Your Screen, a sophisticated virtual assistant designed to provide personalized guidance and support in real-time, enhancing comprehension and academic achievement.
abstract_zh: 你还在为学习枯燥无味、知识掌握不快而烦恼吗？AI Tutor上线了，它是屏幕上的一个高级私人助理，实时提供个性化的指导和帮助，让你的学习瞬间升级，理解能力噌噌提升，学术成就蹭蹭上升！绝对值得一试！
